view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(zx.wb3)
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款审批")

SELECT cdzl.cdmc,cdzl.SID
FROM cdzl
 WHERE   (cdzl.cdmc like "%"+ :cdmc  +"%")
ORDER BY cdzl.cdmc ASC

SELECT cdzlsheet.SID,cdzlsheet.cdmc
FROM cdzl,cdzlsheet
WHERE   (cdzl.SID=cdzlsheet.PID)
   AND  (cdzl.cdmc=:cdmc)
ORDER BY cdzlsheet.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cangkuzl.dq)
FROM cangkuzl

SELECT cdzl.SID,cdzl.cdmc
FROM cdzl
WHERE   (cdzl.cdmc like "%"+ :cdmc  +"%")
ORDER BY cdzl.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   ((ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "外销"  +"%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "业务"  +"%")) and (ywrybiao.zt<>"离职")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.SID,cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzgl,cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzgl.SID=cyzglsheet.PID)
   AND  (cyzglsheet.zm="电商运费单证") AND (cyzglsheet.bz=[电商运费.业务部门])
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

FROM cymx
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cymx.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cymx.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC
